What We Offer

Curated luxury services
for the modern woman

01

Organic Facials

All facials use 100% organic skincare products, tailored to your unique skin type. Every treatment is a personalized experience designed to leave you glowing.

Customized Organic Facial$100 · 90 min

A fully personalized facial using 100% organic products tailored to your unique skin type. Includes deep cleansing, exfoliation, and a custom masque for glowing, refreshed skin.

Hydro Facial ⭐ Andre's Favorite$165 · 90 min

Our most advanced facial — uses water-based exfoliation to deeply cleanse pores, infuse hydration, and resurface the skin. Perfect for fine lines, congestion, and dullness. Results are immediate.

The Ultimate Relaxation$150 · 75 min

The full spa experience. Combines deep cleansing, massage techniques, and nourishing organic masques to leave you completely de-stressed and luminous.

Quick Facial$85 · 45 min

Short on time but still want gorgeous skin? This express treatment delivers cleansing, exfoliation, and hydration in just 45 minutes — perfect for a lunch break refresh.

Pampering for your Teen$75 · 45 min

A gentle, age-appropriate facial designed for teens. Focuses on light cleansing, hydration, and basic skincare education in a calming, comfortable setting.

Back Facial$90 · 45 min

All the benefits of a facial for your back. Includes deep cleansing, exfoliation, and a masque to clear congestion and smooth skin.

Exfoliation Treatment$40 · 30 min

A targeted treatment to slough away dead skin cells, brighten skin tone, and prep skin for better product absorption.

Hot Oil Scalp Massage$20 · 15 min

A deeply relaxing scalp massage using warm oils to nourish the scalp, stimulate circulation, and melt away tension.

Brow Clean Up$25 · 30 min

Precise shaping and grooming of the brows to beautifully frame your face.

Book a Facial →

03

Spray Tans

Achieve a flawless, sun-kissed glow year-round. Our custom spray tan solutions are formulated for a natural, streak-free finish that looks gorgeous on every skin tone — from everyday glam to prom-ready perfection.

  • Spray Tanning (Full Body)$40 · 60 min

Woman-Owned · Since 2015
18
Years of Excellence

Meet Brittani

More than a spa —
a personalized experience

I am a licensed Cosmetologist with over 18 years of experience in the beauty industry. I earned my makeup artist certification from the prestigious Westmore Academy in Burbank, CA, and graduated from the Ann Webb Skin Institute as both an Eyelash Extension Specialist and Cosmetology Instructor.

Known for my enthusiastic personality and commitment to holistic healing, I exclusively use organic skincare products. My passion lies in helping every client feel exceptional and valued — because you deserve nothing less.

Licensed Cosmetologist Westmore Academy Certified Ann Webb Skin Institute Lash Extension Specialist Cosmetology Instructor Organic Skincare StyleSeat Top Pro

Client Intake

Consent Forms

Please complete your consent form before your appointment. This helps Brittani customize your treatment safely and effectively.

All information is kept strictly confidential and used solely to provide you with the safest, most effective treatment. Please fill out completely before your appointment.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Skin Type

Medical & Health History

⚠️ Please check ALL that apply. This information is essential for your safety and treatment customization.

Skin Sensitivity & Medications

⚠️ The following medications cause skin sensitivity and may affect your treatment. Please check all that apply.

Consent & Acknowledgment

I confirm that all information provided is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge.
I understand that certain medical conditions or medications may affect or contraindicate my treatment, and I have disclosed all relevant information.
I understand that results may vary and that Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for any adverse reactions resulting from undisclosed medical conditions or allergies.
I consent to receive the facial treatment and agree to notify my esthetician of any discomfort during the service.
🌸
Thank You!

Your facial consent form has been submitted successfully.
We look forward to seeing you at Brit's Beauty Spa!

Please complete before your lash extension appointment. Your safety and comfort are our top priority.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Eye & Lash History

Medical & Health History

⚠️ Please check all that apply. This is essential for your safety.

Aftercare Acknowledgment

I understand I must avoid water, steam, and sweat for 24–48 hours after my appointment.
I will not use oil-based products near my eyes as they will break down the adhesive.
I will brush my lashes daily with a clean spoolie and sleep on my back or side when possible.
I understand that lash retention varies based on my natural lash cycle, lifestyle, and aftercare habits.
I consent to receive lash extension services and understand that Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for reactions resulting from undisclosed conditions or allergies.
👁️
Thank You!

Your lash extension consent form has been submitted.
We can't wait to give you gorgeous lashes!

Please complete before your lash lift & tint appointment. Your safety is our priority.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Lash Lift History

Medical & Health History

⚠️ The lash lift solution contains a chemical perming agent. Please disclose all relevant conditions.

Aftercare Acknowledgment

I understand I must keep my lashes completely dry for 24 hours after my lash lift.
I will avoid steam, saunas, swimming, and heavy sweating for 24 hours.
I will not rub my eyes or use mascara for 24 hours after my appointment.
I understand that results depend on my natural lash length, thickness, and health, and individual results may vary.
I consent to receive lash lift services and understand Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for reactions from undisclosed conditions or allergies.
✨
Thank You!

Your lash lift consent form has been submitted.
Get ready for gorgeous lifted lashes!

Please complete before your spray tan appointment to ensure the best possible result for your skin tone and type.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Skin Type & Tone

Medical & Health History

⚠️ Please check all that apply. Some conditions and medications can affect your spray tan result or cause skin reactions.

Pre-Tan Prep Acknowledgment

✅ For best results, please confirm you have completed the following before your appointment:
I have exfoliated my skin within 24 hours of my appointment.
I have shaved or waxed at least 24 hours before my appointment.
I am arriving with clean, dry skin — no lotion, deodorant, makeup, or perfume.
I understand I must avoid water, sweating, and tight clothing for at least 8 hours after my tan.
I understand that results depend on my skin type, prep routine, and aftercare, and individual results may vary.
I consent to receive spray tan services and understand Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for reactions from undisclosed conditions or allergies.
🌟
Thank You!

Your spray tan consent form has been submitted.
Get ready for your gorgeous glow!
